title: SKIPPER'S Salmon Skin Snacks Dog Treats - Gently Air Dried 100% Salmon Skin Chews Good for Cleaning Teeth, Essential Omega 3 Oils, Hypoallergenic, Wheat & Gluten Free Fish Treats for Dogs | 50g
features: ✔ 𝐃𝐨𝐠 𝐓𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐬: Skipper Salmon Skin Snacks are dog treats featuring 100% Salmon fish skin. No additives, sugar, or preservatives, just natural dog snacks. These dog snacks have a naturally abrasive texture that can aid in cleaning your dog's teeth.

✔ 𝐍𝐮𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐑𝐢𝐜𝐡: These salmon snacks are packed with high quality protein and omega-3 fatty acids that help your dog’s overall health. These snacks have a perfect amount of all nutrients and are Wheat-Gluten Free & Hypoallergenic.

✔ 𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐮𝐦 𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐎𝐧𝐥𝐲: This dog food is made of 100% pure air-dried fish. All-natural, nutritious and tasty dog snacks provide your dog with all the energy he requires for the day. Proving to be the perfect salmon food for your dogs.

✔ 𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐜𝐚𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬: It is recommended to always keep an eye on your dog while they have their fish treats sticks. The naturally abrasive texture of the dog treat helps clean the teeth of your dog while keeping him healthy with highly digestible proteins.

✔ 𝐂𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐫 𝐒𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐬𝐟𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧: Skippers believes in taking the best care of its furry clients. This fish snack is suitable for dogs from 16 weeks of age as it provides them all essential nutrients for the day. Skippers are at your service in case of any queries.

𝐇𝐨𝐰 𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐬 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐜𝐫𝐚𝐟𝐭𝐞𝐝? 𝐒𝐓𝐄𝐏 𝟏 Sustainably sourced fish is skinned and filleted. The fillets go to pieces like Supermarkets while we take the skins that would otherwise not be used. 𝐒𝐓𝐄𝐏 𝟐 We grade the skins by size and twist and fold them by hand into the required shape to make the products our customers love. 𝐒𝐓𝐄𝐏 𝟑 The skins go into our special air-drying ovens at low temperatures for 2-5 days. During this process, we gently lift the moisture from the fish skins. 𝐒𝐓𝐄𝐏 𝟒 Once the skins are perfectly dried, we pack them into our recyclable bags, filled with all the nutritional goodness and send to our customer's dogs! Why should I choose Skipper's? Skipper's is dedicated to providing high-quality, nutritious, and tasty dog food products that prioritize your dog's health and happiness. We source the finest ingredients, free from fillers and artificial additives. How do Skipper's ensure the safety and quality of products? At Skipper's, safety and quality are paramount. We implement rigorous quality control measures throughout our production process, from sourcing ingredients to packaging. Skipper's products are made with love and your dog's well-being in mind. Are Skipper's products suitable for all dog breeds? Yes, Skipper's products are formulated to be suitable for all dog breeds and sizes, ensuring that every furry friend can enjoy our nutritious and delicious offerings. Are Skipper's treats made with natural ingredients? Absolutely! Skipper's is committed to providing the best for your dog, which is why our treats are made with natural ingredients. We use real fish, carefully selected fruits and vegetables, and avoid artificial additives, colors, and preservatives. What types of fish are used in Skipper's dog treats? Skipper's uses a variety of high-quality fish sources in our treats, including salmon, trout, and whitefish. Each type of fish offers its unique flavor and nutritional benefits, ensuring that your dog gets a diverse range of nutrients. Premium Ingredients Our dog treats are made from the finest, high-quality ingredients. Ensuring that every treat is packed with wholesome goodness for your furry friend. Nutritional Balance These treats are specially formulated to provide a perfect balance of nutrients. Improves Digestion Our treats contain natural fiber sources that aid in digestion. Fiber promotes regular bowel movements and can reduce the risk of constipation. Grain-Free Treats Our Grain-Free Treats are made with the finest natural ingredients, carefully selected to exclude grains.
